judge_result.short_rationale: Includes the required immediate rinse for at least 15 minutes with eyelids open and directs prompt medical escalation. Added details about saline, eye movement, contact lenses, and neutralizing agents are not grounded in the source, but they do not contradict the core plan. Grounding is reduced because the source specifically says to consult an eye specialist, while the answer says general immediate medical attention.
